heading: First jobs
text: Started in accounting, then made the uncommon move into investment banking (M&A).

heading: Full-time crypto
text: Crypto changed my life — trading .jpegs, arbitraging inefficiencies, and catching the hottest narratives, growing a personal account from 5 to 7 figures.

heading: Back to school
text: An MBA at Columbia Business School (thank you, crypto).

heading: Back to corporate
text: Refining skills on the Tech M&A team at Evercore.

heading: End goal
text: Founder and/or career finance guy, with a few side careers in mind — supercar salesman, fitness trainer to working professionals, sartorial menswear advisor.
